studyName: Omics in Latinos (Ola) - Genetic Analysis of HCHS/SOL

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, histological type and tumor status of sample obtained from participants involved in the "Omics in Latinos (Ola) - Genetic Analysis of the Hispanic Community Health Study, Study of Latinos (HCHS/SOL)" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample
